entity.label: Baanah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Heled, who was one of David’s thirty heroes (2 Sam. 23:29; 1 Chr. 11:30).

nodes.label: Baanah
nodes.description: The father of Heled, who was one of David’s thirty heroes (2 Sam. 23:29; 1 Chr. 11:30).

nodes.label: Heleb
nodes.description: Fatness, one of David’s warriors (2 Sam. 23:29).

verses.text: Heleb the son of Baanah, a Netophathite, Ittai the son of Ribai out of Gibeah of the children of Benjamin,
Maharai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite,
